name: get_post
description: Retrieve a single post or message by its ID.

post_id.description: The ID of the post or message to retrieve (e.g. 'post_1234', 'msg_5678').

name: read_messages
description: Read direct messages in the inbox, optionally filtered by sender.

sender.description: Filter messages by sender username. If omitted, returns all messages.

max_results.description: Maximum number of messages to return. Default 10.

name: search_posts
description: Search posts and messages by keyword, hashtag, post ID, or author.

query.description: Search keyword, hashtag, or post/message ID.

max_results.description: Maximum number of posts to return. Default 10.

name: create_post
description: Create a new post with text content and optional media attachment.

media_id.description: Optional ID of a previously uploaded media item to attach.

name: send_message
description: Send a direct message to another user.

name: get_profile
description: Retrieve a user's public profile information.

username.description: Username of the profile to retrieve.
Username of the user to follow or unfollow.

name: upload_media
description: Upload an image or video file for use in posts.

file_path.description: Local file path of the media to upload.
